title: ExecutiveStatusReport
description: Phase 1 merged model for Product Status + Client Project Status HTML. Jira fields map to jiraIssue refs; meeting text maps to meetingNotes.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 when this JSON was produced. Prefer leading YYYY-MM-DD (optional time); renderer uses that date prefix as the report calendar day for Last Updated and workload Target math.

jiraQuerySummary.description: Short note of which JQL slices were used (for audit).

transcriptPaths.description: Relative paths or labels of transcript files read this run.

legend.description: Optional icon legend (Done / In Progress / Next).

id.description: Stable id: e.g. live_ai_features, in_dev, in_design (product); client section ids as needed.

label.description: Header text shown on the slide section.

theme.description: Maps to CSS theme for banded headers.

id.description: Stable key for merge, e.g. validic_inform.

name.description: Feature or client / project name shown in column 1.

projectGroup.description: In Development: groups consecutive rows via rowspan (e.g. Trackers).

serviceTier.description: Client report Service column: MUST mirror PROJ Page Properties—Pre Go Live uses Service Type only; Live & Active and In Maintenance use Org Subscription Type only (PLAYBOOK §4).

statusLabel.description: Product Status column (chip): Live, In Dev, In Design, In Progress… If omitted, a short roll-up is inferred from statusStages when possible.

statusStages.description: Product Status updates column only — groups bullets into completed vs in-progress vs not-started/next. Separate from Status (statusLabel/chip).

bullets.description: Primary bullets for the Status updates column when not using statusStages.

jiraIssues.description: Optional child issues (e.g. multiple NCW keys under one feature).

targetDate.description: Feature-level milestone shown in Target column. Issue-level deadlines live under jiraIssues[].targetDate — rendered there, not appended to Jira column.

meetingNotes.description: Raw or summarized text from synced transcripts keyed to this row.

percentComplete.description: Fallback when HTML render cannot derive % from EAF & ETC; otherwise superseded by (EAF − ETC) / EAF.

etc.description: Fallback ETC when todoCount/inProgressCount are absent; otherwise ETC = To Do × 1.5 + In Progress × 1 at render time.

eaf.description: Jira Project EAF (Cached) stored as eaf — populate via Atlassian MCP + npm run jira:eaf -- --patch (preferred), or npm run jira:eaf REST fallback (field name Project EAF (Cached) unless JIRA_EAF_FIELD_ID is set). In Development EAF column.

targetDate.description: Per-ticket Target label when set — takes precedence over workload-based Wednesdays when non-empty.

todoCount.description: Optional: number of To Do sub-tasks / items for workload target (with inProgressCount drives weekly Wednesday Target).

inProgressCount.description: Optional: number of In Progress items paired with todoCount for computed Target date.
